mainText:
Promo: "At Bank of Entitlement, we believe you deserve it all. Get ready to experience a level of VIP treatment that you won't find anywhere else!"

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So there I was, strolling into my favorite coffee shop, already feeling like I owned the place because, let's face it, I practically do. I waltzed up to the counter, ready to order my usual quad-shot, half-caf, no-foam, extra-hot latte with a sprinkle of gold flakes on top. But as I opened my mouth to place my order, I was interrupted by a barista who had the audacity to ask, "And what's your name for the cup?" My name? My name?! As if I, Hot Josh, CEO of Bank of Entitlement, needed to be identified by some lowly barista at a coffee shop?!I took a deep breath, trying to contain my outrage. Who did this barista think they were, challenging my right to sip my liquid gold in peace? I squared my shoulders, looked them dead in the eye, and declared, "You know what? Just write 'The Boss' on that cup. Because that's who I am, and that's how I roll." The barista blinked in surprise, scribbled down my decree, and handed me my coffee with a trembling hand. I snatched it up, feeling the eyes of everyone in the cafe on me, and with a smug smirk, I took a sip of my perfectly crafted beverage.As the liquid luxury danced on my tongue, I couldn't help but feel a rush of satisfaction. Sure, maybe I'd overreacted a bit, but in that moment, as "The Boss" emblazoned on my cup, I knew I was right to demand the respect and recognition I deserved. Because when you're as hot as me, entitlement isn't just a way of life-it's a birthright.
